title: TrailCurrent Playbill — MQTT broker connection
description: Stored separately from settings.json because it contains a secret. The Settings → Connection screen in the GUI is the only thing that writes to it.

username.description: MQTT username for the rig broker

password.description: MQTT password. Persisted at file mode 0600. Never published over MQTT or written to logs.

tlsCertHostname.description: Optional TLS hostname override. Used when the broker cert was issued for a different hostname than we connect to (e.g., 'mosquitto' inside the container network vs. 'headwaters.local' on the LAN). Mirrors Headwaters' TLS_CERT_HOSTNAME env var.

caCertProvided.description: True if a CA cert has been written to ~/.config/trailcurrent-playbill/ca.pem. Set automatically when the user uploads/pastes one in the Settings UI.
